message:
fix(dolt): retry on serialization error in TestConcurrentIssueCreation

Dolt Error 1213 (serialization failure) is expected when concurrent
transactions conflict at commit time. Add retry with backoff in the
test goroutines and extract isSerializationError helper to errors.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
